title: U.S. strikes Iran after Trump accuses Tehran of ceasefire violation in Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: The attack comes as the United States and Iran are supposed to be engaging in a 60-period of no hostilities as they hold talks to end their war.
summary_public: The attack comes as the United States and Iran are supposed to be engaging in a 60-period of no hostilities as they hold talks to end their war.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: U.S. strikes Iran after Trump accuses Tehran of ceasefire violation
